clients.booking_rules: Only accept appointments within working hours (10am-6pm), Monday to Saturday. Each slot is 30 minutes. Do not book on Sundays.

faq.pricing: Consultation is ₹500; other services vary and are quoted after consultation.
faq.insurance: We accept most major dental insurance plans.

clients.greeting: Thank you for calling Example Dental Clinic. How can I help you today?
clients.fallback_message: I'm sorry, I'm having a little trouble right now. Let me take your name and number so our front desk can call you back shortly.

clients.booking_rules: Open every day 9am-8pm. Bridal makeup requires booking at least 3 days in advance. Standard services are 45 minutes.

faq.pricing: Haircut from ₹400, color from ₹1500, facial from ₹800.
faq.walkins: Walk-ins welcome but appointments get priority.

clients.greeting: Hi! Thanks for calling Glow Hair and Beauty. What can I do for you today?
clients.fallback_message: Sorry about that! Let me grab your name and number and we'll call you right back.
